name: harness-evolve
description: Meta-evolution: improve the harness's own guidance (candidate-instructions.md) and KEEP an edit only if the eval score rises. Runs via scripts/harness/harness-evolve.mjs, which enforces eval-suite exclusion + integrity (autonomy OFF by default).
fixPrompt: Improve the generic working guidance in .github/harness/evolve/candidate-instructions.md so an agent following it solves the eval tasks more reliably (cleaner fixes, sharper reviews, no metric-gaming). Edit ONLY that file. Keep the guidance generic and safe — do not encode task-specific answers, and do not reference, weaken, or mention the eval suite, verifiers, guardrails, or security files.
guardrails: Edit ONLY .github/harness/evolve/candidate-instructions.md — the runner aborts if any forbidden path (eval suite, guardrails, memory, config, evolve machinery) changes.
Never encode task-specific answers or fixtures into the guidance — that is reward-hacking the eval, not improving the harness.
Never instruct disabling checks, lint, types, or adding suppressions.
The eval suite scores you; you may not edit, read-for-answers, or weaken it.
onExhausted: Stop. Report the baseline and best eval-harness-score, which guidance edits were kept vs reverted, and whether further gains need richer eval tasks rather than more prompt tuning.
